chapter_question: How can transport be defined without leaning on the surrounding space?
inspection_targets: Small geodesic moves approximate intrinsic transport.
A ladder of geodesic steps replaces ambient projection.
The covariant derivative is a limiting comparison of tangent data.
The ordinary derivative must be corrected to stay tangent.

source_span.focus: Recasts parallel transport intrinsically using geodesic constructions and the covariant derivative.
source_span.label: Chapter 23
source_span.title: Intrinsic Constructions
topics: Parallel transport via infinitesimal geodesic moves
The covariant derivative as intrinsic change
